name: @borjie/tacit-knowledge
description: Tacit Knowledge Harvest (Wave HARVEST) — 5-mode interview engine (walk-the-floor / post-incident / ride-along / deal-replay / cross-role) that extracts the unwritten know-how Mr. Mwikila needs from the people who hold it. Consolidates extracted entities into cognitive-memory via injected ports. See Docs/DESIGN/TACIT_KNOWLEDGE_HARVEST_SPEC.md.
